title: Red's Dimensions
description: A Simple Mod which adds multiple dimensions to the game.
body:
Hi There. Its me again with a brand new mod.                                                           
**Red's Dimensions**  
This mod add multiple new Dimensions to the game.
1. Wooden Dimension.
2. Netherite Dimension.    


So far these 2 are in the game right now. More Dimensions will be added in the game                    
**AND SPOILER ALERT**                                                                                  
I am working on the Deep Dark Dimension. It will take a little time but it will come out soon.  

Now one thing to mention Fire Spread (DoFireTick) Gamerule will be off by this mod. BCZ I wasn't able to stop the genration of Underground lava pools at the bottom of the World. Otherwise the lava will start burning all the wood in this Dimension (BCZ the entire dimension is just made of wood) and gonna lag your your game so much.

Now as for the current ones, these are the portals.                                                 ![Portals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57cfc2a22632887814a7fb0c7c85bdc43f66ff32.png)
Remember to make the Portal of Wooden Dimension with Stripped Oak Wood (Specifically). Not with Stripped Oak Log.                                                                                    
Now For the recipes they are also given below.![Wooden Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a20cf93d63d1b1289ad3ade6db81e58fdd10cbe_0.webp)
![Nether Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9bc292331a066f4148ec64be237ed12696573dc_0.webp)
Now Just go in and have a surprise of UNLIMITED WOOD AND UNLIMITED NETHERITE....
